posts.title: Phase 1 — Keywords & TACOS
posts.text:
[TEST] AMAZON Phase 1 — Keywords & TACOS — Jul 14, 2026 (2nd pass · duplicate guard DISABLED for testing)

Data: Supermetrics generated 2026-07-13 23:30 PT (~8h50m old, <12h). connectors 2026-07-14 07:55 PT. No new per-SKU Amazon data since 8:07 AM run — findings confirm prior staging.

RED — Slicker Brush (B0FQ628KCH, LIQUIDATION): $1.05 spend today / $7.72 7d — violation of no-ad-funding rule (per L-2026-07-14-001). RED flag only; no bid/keyword/campaign rec per hard rule. Prior directive staged 8:07 AM — flag stands until Angelo confirms pause in Ad Console.

Negative-keyword candidates: NOT STAGED — no keyword/search-term-level click data this run. Browser unavailable; Supermetrics C = ASIN-level 7d spend only.

Bid recs — Emergency Dematter (B0FQL56V99, YELLOW, ROAS 1.83 vs. 2.07 breakeven):
- "dematting tool for dogs" (rank 5, vol 2,624): LOWER — organic top-5, trim paid to cut waste below breakeven
- "dematting comb for dogs" (rank 25, vol 5,465): HOLD
- "detangler for dogs" (rank 12, -4) / "dog detangler" (rank 13, -4): HOLD — organic sliding; per L-2026-07-08-001, don't cut into the gap
(Rake Brush, Pin Brush, Detangling Treatment, Shampoo, Slicker: no H10 keyword coverage — pre-existing 3-of-6 tracker gap.)

Rank defense — Emergency Dematter: "detangler for dogs" (rank 12, -4) and "dog detangler" (rank 13, -4) — both 3+ spot drops. Plan: hold bids at current ceiling, don't cut. Per L-2026-07-08-001: keyword pair known-volatile; paid ROAS not collapsing alongside organic dip. TACOS 141.9% = no headroom to raise. Campaign ID/ceiling unavailable (no browser).

TACOS guard (directional — 7d spend / single-day sales proxy; day-count mismatch):
- Emergency Dematter: 141.9% RED HOT — reallocation discussion needed; Will + Angelo required (spend authority)
- Detangling Treatment: 79.2% RED | Pin Brush: 52.1% RED | 4-in-1 Shampoo: 68.7% RED
- Rake Brush: 11.2% OK | Slicker Brush: n/a (LIQUIDATE-VIOLATION)
No reallocation staged — data caveat holds; KILL-band pause (staged 8:07 AM) is the cleaner near-term lever.
B0GT1H84JM unrecognized ASIN ($258.62/day, $1,405.94 7d, ROAS 0.00): prior directive stands — not duplicating.

Staged by AMAZON routine (STG 033 v1.0, TEST MODE)

posts.title: Phase 2 — Listings
posts.text:
[TEST] AMAZON Phase 2 — Listings — Jul 14, 2026 (2nd pass · duplicate guard DISABLED for testing)

Listing-score triage: NOT PERFORMED — H10 Listing Analyzer still stale (last: 2026-07-06). No prioritized fix list stageable this run.

Review-driven fixes: NOT STAGED. reviews.recent re-reviewed (15 entries). Emergency Dematter "ineffective/didn't work" theme: 2 confirmed instances with clear product attribution (Jun 19 2-star, Jul 6 2-star) — still below the 3+ threshold. Jun 24 1-star (product: null) not counted — product unattributed. No Gus cluster; review sheet unchanged since Jul 9; 0 new reviews this run.

COMPLIANCE FLAG — new this pass (not in 8:07 AM run):
H10 product tracking shows: "Skip The Groomer Detangling Spray" — ASIN B0FQ4PY573
Two BRAND_RULES violations in the title:
  1. "Skip The Groomer" prefix — Rule 1: brand name in logo/sign-off/URL only, never in product titles
  2. "Spray" — Rule 2: banned for Detangling Treatment (never spray, mist, or spritz; application is always a small amount on the coat)
Note: B0FQ4PY573 is NOT the tracked Detangling Treatment (B0GV5ZFLC2) — two different ASINs. Possible states: old/deprecated listing still live, duplicate, or mismatched H10 track.

Structural — Will (Angelo has no Slack seat): Confirm whether B0FQ4PY573 is a live listing. If live: update title immediately — remove prefix and Spray.
If title requires full copy rewrite: routed to Anchor — Brief ID COMP-2026-07-14-001 (see #stg-creative-pipeline).

Prior structural items still open (not yet 48h BLOCKED):
- 7 unrecognized bundle ASINs from 8:07 AM run (per L-2026-07-08-003, ~4h elapsed)
- B0FQFP2S9F FurFix De-Shed Brush from Jul 13 (~29h elapsed)

Hard rules held: Slicker Brush liquidation listing stands. Product moments unblurred. Walmart: out of scope v1.

Staged by AMAZON routine (STG 033 v1.0, TEST MODE)

posts.title: Close-out
posts.text:

Review theme below 3+ threshold — no review-driven listing change staged.

Step 3: prior staged items from 8:07 AM — 0 replies found, not yet 48h BLOCKED; no approvals logged.
Angelo has no Slack seat — fallback @will per standing flag (same pattern as JJ — flag in every close-out until resolved).

AMAZON routine (STG 033 v1.0, TEST MODE)
